posts.author: Gaurav_Catalyst
posts.text: What a simple, plain text Resignation email from ECO to Chairman. He was on medical leave from last two quarters. Wondering how Bain Capital trusted on this fellow to turnaround Manappuram. Or It is too difficult to work with VP Nandkumar that CEO first went on medical leave and then even resigned. A short term set back on the day Manappuram touched life time high. Also, Resignation email received before 12 noon, but company disclosing post market hours. image 1129×542 58.9 KB
